'''nalawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacciniola|vacciniola]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacciniola|vacciniola]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nalawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nælæwæth|nælæwæth]] || [[word:nælæwæj|nælæwæj]] || [[word:nælæwæsh|nælæwæsh]] || [[word:nælæwæ|nælæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nalalawath|nalalawath]] || [[word:nalalawaj|nalalawaj]] || [[word:nalalawash|nalalawash]] || [[word:nalalawa|nalalawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nalawath|nalawath]] || [[word:nalawaj|nalawaj]] || [[word:nalawash|nalawash]] || [[word:nalawa|nalawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nalafwath|nalafwath]] || [[word:nalafwaj|nalafwaj]] || [[word:nalafwash|nalafwash]] || [[word:nalafwaf|nalafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nalawatha|nalawatha]] || [[word:nalawaja|nalawaja]] || [[word:nalawasha|nalawasha]] || [[word:nalawaka|nalawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nalawath|nalawath]] || [[word:nalawaj|nalawaj]] || [[word:nalawash|nalawash]] || [[word:nalawa|nalawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nalawathal|nalawathal]] || [[word:nalawajal|nalawajal]] || [[word:nalawashal|nalawashal]] || [[word:nalawakal|nalawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nalawathatha|nalawathatha]] || [[word:nalawajaja|nalawajaja]] || [[word:nalawashasha|nalawashasha]] || [[word:nalawaka|nalawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nalawathan|nalawathan]] || [[word:nalawajan|nalawajan]] || [[word:nalawashan|nalawashan]] || [[word:nalawakan|nalawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nalawathaoro|nalawathaoro]] || [[word:nalawajaoro|nalawajaoro]] || [[word:nalawashaoro|nalawashaoro]] || [[word:nalawakaoro|nalawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
